message:
Implement MCP server, web auth + Prometheus metrics, and expand CLI
with incident, fleet, digest, db, and watch commands

MCP server (vc_mcp/src/lib.rs, ~1540 lines):
- Complete JSON-RPC 2.0 server over stdin/stdout implementing the Model
  Context Protocol for external AI agent access
- 9 tools: vc_fleet_status, vc_query_machines, vc_query_alerts,
  vc_query_sessions, vc_query_incidents, vc_query_nl,
  vc_collector_status, vc_playbook_drafts, vc_audit_log
- 2 resources: vc://fleet/overview, vc://machines
- McpServer with handle_request() dispatcher and run_stdio() event loop
- ToolDefinition with JSON Schema input_schema for each tool
- JSON-RPC error mapping (-32600/-32601/-32602/-32603)

Web auth + metrics (vc_web):
- auth.rs (629 lines): Token-based auth with hierarchical RBAC
  (Read < Operator < Admin), bearer token extraction, IP allowlisting,
  localhost bypass for development, 401/403 error responses
- lib.rs: Add /metrics endpoint serving Prometheus text format with
  gauges for collector freshness, open alerts by severity, health
  scores per machine, machine count, and counters for collector
  successes and uptime

CLI expansion (vc_cli):
- toon.rs (539 lines): Token-Optimized Object Notation output format
  reducing JSON by 60-70% for agent consumption with compact section
  codes, severity prefixes, and percentage suffixes
- watch.rs (569 lines): Real-time JSONL event streaming for guardian
  agents with WatchSeverity enum, 6 event types, automatic severity
  assignment for health changes, WatchFilter with event/machine/
  severity filtering, and heartbeat passthrough
- New Incident subcommand: create, list, show, update, note add/list,
  timeline, and replay operations with full store integration
- New Mcp subcommand: serve (start MCP stdio server), tools (list
  available tools), call (invoke tool by name with JSON args)
- New Db subcommand: info, export (to JSON), import (from JSON)
- New Digest subcommand: generate periodic digest reports, list, show
- New Fleet subcommand: spawn, rebalance, emergency-stop, migrate,
  history with command tracking
- All commands gain --format toon support via the toon module
- Watch handler rewrite with WatchFilter, batch buffering, and TOON
  output mode
- Add vc_mcp and uuid workspace dependencies to Cargo.toml

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
